title: [epic] ELECROW ThinkNode M6 solar relay support
description: ELECROW ThinkNode M6: nRF52840 + LoRa (chip TBD) + GPS + 6W solar + 7000mAh. Outdoor relay/border router node. Need to identify LoRa chip (SX1262 vs LR1110), GPS chip, pin mapping. If LR1110, blocked by iw00.
close_reason: Completed LR1110 Zephyr driver extension (init/config/TX/RX/CAD per Semtech lib+manual), board defs+validation for ThinkNode M3/M6+T1000-E, renode sim/Kconfig/tests. 3 codereview passes, west build PASS on targets. Scoped to driver/boards/tests. Independent test vectors. All closed.
